title: Training worksheet to DOCX/PDF
route: normalize_markdown --worksheet-lines -> build_reference_docx --style warm-editorial -> pandoc docx -> validate
notes: Use for printable exercises, learning worksheets, and workshop handouts. Preserve blank writing lines and checklist items.

title: Institutional 16:9 presentation
notes: Use white canvas, one accent color, sparse executive layout, mono numbers, rounded cards, and strong footer/page consistency.

title: 4:5 social carousel from Markdown
route: slide plan -> render_html_deck --style selected-style -> PNG/JPG -> optional PPTX -> validate
notes: Use high-resolution 1638x2048 export, short slide copy, strong hook, safe margins, and mobile-readable typography.

title: Markdown documentation bundle
route: expand includes -> normalize heading hierarchy -> docs/pdf output -> validate
notes: Use docs route when structure and navigation matter more than slide drama.

title: Training bootcamp bundle
route: split source by artifact -> slide route + document route -> validate all
notes: Use when one source should become both presentation slides and participant handouts.

title: Data-heavy operating review
route: normalize tables -> render_html_deck --style data-command -> images/pptx -> validate
notes: Use for KPI reports and operating reviews with dense but legible tables and metrics.

title: Premium cinematic narrative
route: slide plan -> custom visual HTML/CSS -> images -> pptx/pdf -> validate
notes: Use for dramatic sparse storytelling, portfolio decks, and premium product narratives.
